arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has new appreciation for Man City feats after recent poor form
arts.sum: City take on Manchester United at the Etihad on Sunday having won only one of their last 10 games.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola opens up on decision to stay at Man City and reveals the one thing that would have kept him from SLEEPING in contract decision
arts.sum: Guardiola signed a two-year contract extension last month following four consecutive defeats, but the decision has not triggered an upturn in form.

arts.ttl: Man City v Man Utd - five talking points on an unusual derby
arts.sum: Manchester United are enduring their worst-ever start to a Premier League season - Manchester City their worst since 2010. BBC Sport looks at five key areas before an unusual Manchester derby on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man City looking into Pogba move - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester City weigh up a move for Paul Pogba, Newcastle United interested in West Ham's Mohammed Kudus, Bayern Munich rule out signing a Harry Kane replacement in January, plus more.

arts.ttl: Report ex-Juventus star Pogba approached by Manchester City
arts.sum: There are reports in England that Paul Pogba could return to the Premier League for...

arts.ttl: Juventus director breaks silence on transfer links to Man United forward Joshua Zirkzee
arts.sum: Serie A giants Juventus have been linked with a move for Manchester United forward Joshua Zirkzee

arts.ttl: Man Utd chase Champions League star who left Scholes stunned
arts.sum: Juventus ’ Kenan Yildiz has emerged as a transfer target for the Red Devils, with the 19-year-old having starred in the midweek victory over Manchester City – evidently the first time that United legend Scholes had set eyes on the Turkey international star. This was amply demonstrated by TNT Sports pundit Paul Scholes following a virtuoso performance from the teenager as Thiago Motta’s side shocked Man City in midweek.

arts.ttl: Man Utd get Zirkzee sale boost as club go public on transfer desire: He’s very good!
arts.sum: One man who has been linked with a departure from Juventus in January is Douglas Luiz, who, like Zirkzee, has failed to make an impact following a summer move. Man Utd get Zirkzee sale boost as club go public on transfer desire: He’s very good!

arts.ttl: Michael Owen gives his prediction for Manchester City vs Manchester United
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to clash with local rivals Manchester United on Sunday and former Red Devils striker Michael Owen has made his prediction ahead of the game

arts.ttl: Man City legend claims Pep Guardiola's hopes of silverware hinge on TWO key players this season
arts.sum: Once the all-conquering behemoth of English football, Pep Guardiola 's side have only one win in their last 10 outings - off the back of winning their fourth straight Premier League title last season.
